## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] chore / refactor / test

## How was this verified?

<!-- Commands run, manual testing, screenshots for UI changes. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `cd backend && go build ./... && go test ./...` passes; `gofmt -l .` is clean
- [ ] `cd frontend && npm run check && npm run build` passes (0 errors/warnings)
- [ ] Updated docs / `CHANGELOG.md` (Unreleased) where relevant
- [ ] No secrets committed; privacy-first principles upheld
